name: Binding ddG
description: Predict changes in binding energy upon mutation for protein-protein complexes. Wild Type and Mutant Protein Complexes must have the same chain lengths. Experimentally shown to improve antibody CDRs, increasing potency by ~10 to 600-fold against SARS-CoV-2 variants.
capabilities: Predict changes in binding energy upon mutation for protein-protein complexes
Wild Type and Mutant Protein Complexes must have the same chain lengths
Experimentally shown to improve antibody CDRs, increasing potency by ~10 to 600-fold against SARS-CoV-2 variants

wildtype_complex.description: Wild-type protein-protein complex structure in PDB format

mutant_complex.description: Mutant protein-protein complex structure in PDB format (must have same chain lengths as wild type)
